Module 6:
JV Launch, Part 3
!
Executive Summary
We’ve now talked about how to find JV partners, and also how to build
relationships with them. Now let’s get into how you actually go about
contacting them.
You want to avoid sending a blind email or message to someone. Build the
relationship first and get yourself on their radar. The best way to do this is
to attend a live event and meet people in person.
The next best way is the phone - this can vary by the market. Direct mail or
sending a direct package through FedEx is also good - they’ll definitely
open it.
The last place would be email or social media. Note: Depending on the
market you may need to educate this person on what a Joint Venture is and
how they work.
Once you make contact and you’ve built value for them, there are certain
things people are looking for when thinking about promoting your product.
!
!
!

What Potential JV Partners Look For
Whether they’ll make money - so show them your launch and share your
metrics
Dollars per visit or dollars per opt in - “It’s a tested launch and it
generated these numbers”
That it’s a great product - show them testimonials and results
Confidence that they’re going to get paid
It all comes down to what is in it for them!
Are you willing to promote for them - reciprocity
Does the offer match their list - this will be important to them
!
